item.title: The Art of the Deflection
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

The Art of the Deflection

In politics, Trump’s quite the deft,
From Epstein’s mess, he quickly left.
With tariffs at play,
EU found its way,
While Harvard and he sparred bereft.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • How Trump Deflected MAGA’s Wrath Over Epstein, at Least for Now
  • How Trump’s Tariffs and Foreign Policies Have Bolstered Support for the E.U.
  • Trump Administration and Harvard Face Crucial Court Test

item.title: Corporate Secrets and Political Shifts
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Corporate Secrets and Political Shifts

Google’s secrets they tried to conceal,
With messages employees should not reveal.
While McMahon shifts schools,
And Oz takes health tools,
Trump’s era makes old norms surreal.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • How Google Spent 15 Years Concealing Its Internal Conversations
  • Trump Chooses Linda McMahon, a Longtime Ally, for Education Secretary
  • Trump Picks Dr. Oz to Oversee Medicare and Medicaid
